compiled_state.title: [UPDATE] Rewrite test-ci-llm-review-job.sh: 1:1 assertion replacement for classifier-driven job
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Rewrite assertions in tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-job.sh using 1:1 replacement. Each old test is renamed and updated — no tests are deleted. Must land in the same commit as Task 4a (ci-dso-staged.yml template update) to avoid a window where tests are RED with no template change.

## File Impact
### Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-job.sh

## 1:1 replacement mapping (rename + update assertion body)

OLD → NEW:
test_llm_review_uses_claude_code_action
  → test_llm_review_uses_classifier_runner
  New assertion: llm-review job has a step with 'run:' containing 'ci-llm-review-runner.sh'
  Must FAIL against current template (which has claude-code-action)

test_llm_review_validates_required_variables
  → test_llm_review_exposes_anthropic_api_key
  New assertion: step env block contains 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'
  Must FAIL against current template (which validates DSO_LLM_TIER not ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in env)

test_llm_review_tier_selection_maps_model
  → test_llm_review_uses_gh_pr_diff
  New assertion: step run contains 'gh pr diff |'
  Must FAIL against current template

test_llm_review_action_uses_api_key_from_secrets
  → test_llm_review_github_token_in_env
  New assertion: step env block contains 'GITHUB_TOKEN'

Any other tests not in the above list: retain unchanged.

## RED verify (tests must fail before Task 4a)
( bash tests/scripts/test-batched.sh --runner=bash --test-dir=tests/scripts --filter=test-ci-llm-review-job.sh ); [[ $? -ne 0 ]]

## GREEN verify (after Task 4a template update — must commit Task 2 + Task 4a together)
bash tests/scripts/test-batched.sh --runner=bash --test-dir=tests/scripts --filter=test-ci-llm-review-job.sh
